deals.name: Constructed Matter Inc
deals.description:
Constructed Matter, Inc. is a Scottsdale-based builder specializing in high-end custom homes, transformative renovations, and select commercial projects throughout the greater Phoenix area — including Arcadia, Paradise Valley, and Central Phoenix.

This engagement includes the full buildout of Constructed Matter’s digital infrastructure and growth ecosystem. The project covers the development of a modern, performance-driven website aligned with their craftsmanship and brand positioning, along with CRM implementation, automation workflows, lead generation systems, project management integration, email marketing, and CPaaS (Twilio Voice & SMS) integration.

The objective is to create a scalable, automated business framework that supports:

• Architect, designer, contractor, and realtor lead generation
• RFP and municipal opportunity tracking
• Client communication and follow-up automation
• Project lifecycle management
• Brand elevation within the luxury residential and commercial markets

This deal positions Constructed Matter for long-term operational efficiency, stronger referral pipelines, improved lead tracking, and a refined digital presence that reflects the quality and intentionality of their builds.
deals.notes: Contact is ready, need to eliminate the small option and print out tomorrow morning. Signing tomorrow morning.
